3.narrative: From a starting price of 887.52, the stock ended at 998.1, reflecting a total return of 12.4594% over the period. The annualized volatility was 0.210309, indicating moderate price fluctuations, while the maximum drawdown observed was -4.3733%, showing a relatively contained peak-to-trough decline. The largest single-day gain occurred on 2026-01-08, with a 3.7084% increase closing at 915.31, accompanied by a high trading volume of 5,207,200 shares, which was also noted as a high volume day. This price jump coincided with multiple news releases on the same date, including Costco Wholesale Corporation's report on second quarter and year-to-date operating results for fiscal 2026 and February sales results [1], as well as December sales results [2], and a dividend declaration [3]. The largest single-day decline was on 2025-12-15, with a 2.7033% drop closing at 860.56 and a volume of 4,771,400 shares. Another notable down day was on 2026-02-10, with a 2.6424% decrease closing at 971.23 but with lower volume of 1,781,500 shares. A particularly high volume day was on 2025-12-19, with 10,097,600 shares traded, though the price change was minimal at -0.2297%. Overall, the average daily volume decreased by 28.9658% to 2,622,431 shares. The price movements around the largest up day appear linked to positive earnings and sales reports, while the largest down day lacks a directly associated driver in the provided data, suggesting other factors may have influenced the decline.
tldr: Largest up day: 2026-01-08 (3.71%), largest down day: 2025-12-15 (-2.70%).
